sourceDesc.p: Derived from CDSL MW, PWG, and PWK source records for interoperability analysis.

projectDesc.p: tei-archival-profile-v0.1; TEI is used as the archival/textual model. Raw CDSL records are preserved as escaped source-entry quotes, while selected lexical structures are promoted into TEI entry, form, sense, citation, and relation elements.

revisionDesc.change: Included in the full machine-reviewed TEI profile.

sense.def: praise, sing (also used of the roaring of the Marut s, and of a bull [

listBibl.head: Machine-extracted citation index; source quotes preserve the archival text.

cit.quote:
<L>15701<pc>89,3<k1>arc<k2>arc<h>1<e>1
<hom>1.</hom> <s>arc</s> ¦ <ab>cl.</ab> 1. <ab>P.</ab> <s>a/rcati</s> (<ab>Subj.</ab> <s>a/rcAt</s>; <ab>impf.</ab> <s>A/rcat</s>; <ab>aor.</ab> <s>ArcIt</s>, <ls>Bhaṭṭ.</ls>; <ab>perf.</ab> <s>Anarca</s>, 3. <ab>pl.</ab> <s>AnarcuH</s> [<ls>MBh. iii, 988</ls>, &c.], but <lang>Ved.</lang> <s>Anfcu/H</s> [<ls>RV.</ls>]; <ab>perf.</ab> <ab>Ā.</ab> (<ab>Pass.</ab>) <s>Anarce</s> [<ls>Bhaṭṭ.</ls>], but <lang>Ved.</lang> <s>sa/m Anfce</s> [<ls>RV. i, 160, 4</ls>]; <ab>fut.</ab> <ab>p.</ab> <s>arcizyat</s> [<ls>Mn. iv, 251</ls>]; <ab>ind.p.</ab> <s>arcya</s> [<ls>Mn.</ls> &c.; <ab>cf.</ab> <ls>Pāṇ. vii, 1, 38</ls>, <ab>Sch.</ab>] or <s>arcitvA</s> [<ls>R. iii, 77, 15</ls>]; <lang>Ved.</lang> <ab>Inf.</ab> <s>fca/se</s> [<ls>RV. vi, 39, 5</ls> & <ls n="RV.">vii, 61, 6</ls>]) to shine, be brilliant, <ls>RV.</ls>;
<div n="to"/>to praise, sing (also used of the roaring of the <s1>Marut</s1>s, and of a bull [<ls>RV. iv, 16, 3</ls>]), <ls>RV.</ls>; <ls>AV.</ls>; <ls>ŚBr.</ls>, to praise anything to another (<ab>dat.</ab>), recommend, <ls>RV.</ls>;
<div n="to"/>to honour or treat with respect, <ls>MBh.</ls> &c.;
<div n="to"/>to adorn, <ls>VarBṛS.</ls> : exceptionally <ab>Ā.</ab> (1. <ab>pl.</ab> <s>arcAmahe</s>)
<div n="to"/>to honour, <ls>MBh. ii, 1383</ls>:
<div n="vp"/><ab>Caus.</ab> (2. <ab>sg.</ab> <s>arcayas</s>) to cause to shine, <ls>RV. iii, 44, 2.</ls> <ab>P.</ab> <ab>Ā.</ab> to honour or treat with respect, <ls>Mn.</ls>; <ls>MBh.</ls> &c.:
<div n="vp"/><ab>Desid.</ab> <s>arcicizati</s>, to wish to honour, <ls>Pāṇ. vi, 1, 3</ls>, <ab>Sch.</ab> <lang>Ved.</lang> <ab>Pass.</ab> <s>fcyate</s> (<ab>p.</ab> <s>fcya/mAna</s>)
<div n="to"/>to be praised, <ls>RV.</ls><info whitneyroots="arc,4"/><info verb="genuineroot" cp="1P,1Ā"/>
<LEND>

<L>5818<pc>1-0423<k1>arc<k2>arc<h>1
1. {#arc#}¦, {#a/rcati#}

5. {#arj#} . — <ab>caus.</ab> {%strahlen machen%}: {#ha\ryannu\zasa^marcaya\H sUrya^M ha\ryanna^rocayaH#}
<ls>ṚV. 3,44,2.</ls> <ab>Vgl.</ab> <ab>u.</ab> {#prati#} .
<div n="1">— 2) {%lobsingen, preisen%}
<ls>NAIGH. 3,14.</ls> {#arcA^mi sumna\yanna\hamantyU^tim#}
<ls>ṚV. 1,138,1.</ls> {#tada^smE\ navya^maNgira\svada^rcata\ SuzmA\ yada^sya pra\tnaTo\dIra^te#}
<ls n="ṚV.">2,17,1.</ls> {#yasmA^ a\rkaM sa\ptaSI^rzARamAnf\cuH#} (<ab>vgl.</ab>
<ls>P. 6,1,36</ls>) <ls>VĀLAKH. 3,4.</ls> <ls>ṚV. 1,6,8.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 1,">10,1.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 1,">19,4.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 1,">92,3.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">10,12,4.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 10,">112,9.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 10,">165,1.</ls> <ab>u. s. w.</ab> <ls>AV. 12,1,38.</ls> <ls n="AV.">18,3,63.</ls> vom {%Singen%} der Winde: {#Arca\nnatra^ ma\ruta\H sasmi^nnA\jO#}
<ls>ṚV. 1,52,15.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 1,">85,2.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 1,">165,1.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 1,">166,7.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">3,14,4.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">5,29,6.</ls> vom {%Brüllen%} des Stiers: {#vfzA\ yatseka^M vipipA\no arcA^t#}
<ls n="ṚV.">4,16,3.</ls> Im
<ls>ŚAT. BR.</ls> in der Regel in Verbindung mit {#Sram: arcantaH SrAmyantaSceruH#}
<ls n="ŚAT. BR.">1,2,5,7.</ls> <ls n="ŚAT. BR. 1,2,5,">18.</ls> <ls n="ŚAT. BR. 1,">8,1,7.</ls> <ls n="ŚAT. BR.">4,2,4,15.</ls> <ls n="ŚAT. BR. 4,">5,4,3.</ls> <ls n="ŚAT. BR.">10,4,3,6.</ls> <ls n="ŚAT. BR. 10,">6,5,1</ls> (= <ls>BṚH. ĀR. UP. 1,2,1</ls>). <ls n="ŚAT. BR.">11,1,6,7.</ls> <ab>u. s. w.</ab> — <ab>pass.</ab>: {#yAByA^M gAya\tramf\cyate^#}
<ls>ṚV. 8,38,10.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">7,70,6.</ls> <ab>part.</ab> <ab>praes.</ab> <ab>pass.</ab>
<ls n="ṚV.">6,38,2.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 6,">49,3.</ls> {#fc, fca/ti#} {%loben%}
<ls>DHĀTUP. 28,19.</ls> <ab>Vgl.</ab> {#arka, arkin, fc#} .
<div n="1">— 3) {%ehren, seine Achtung erweisen; begrüssen%}
<ls>DHĀTUP. 7,24.</ls> mit dem <ab>acc.</ab>: {#evaM yaH sarvaBUtAni brAhmaRo nityamarcati#}

<ls n="M.">4,150.</ls> {#yadarcati#}
<ls n="M.">8,305.</ls> <ls>MBH. 1,6453.</ls> <ls n="MBH.">2,1379.</ls> <ls>R. 6,104,38.</ls> {#tvAm — brAhmaRAH — mantrErarcan#} (sic)
<ls>MBH. 3,169.</ls> {#Arcan#}
<ls>BHAṬṬ. 17,5.</ls> {#Anarca#}
<ls>R. 2,25,24.</ls>
<ls>RAGH. 2,21.</ls> <ls n="RAGH.">4,84.</ls> {#AnarcuH#}
<ls>INDR. 3,1.</ls>
<ls>MBH. 3,988.</ls> {#ArcIt#}
<ls>BHAṬṬ. 1,15.</ls> {#arcizyandevatAtiTIn#}
<ls>M. 4,251.</ls> <ab>gerund.</ab> {#arcitvA#}
<ls>R. 3,77,15.</ls> und {#arcya#}
<ls>M. 1,4.</ls> <ls n="M.">7,145.</ls>
<ls>MBH. 3,8018.</ls> {#arcya tAndevAngataH#} <ab>ved.</ab>
<ls>P. 7,1,38</ls>, <ab>Sch.</ab>
<ab>med.</ab>: {#arcAmahe 'rcitaM sadBiH#}
<ls>MBH. 2,1383.</ls> <ab>pass.</ab>: {#Anarce tena#}
<ls>BHAṬṬ. 14,63.</ls> — <ab>caus.</ab> {#arca^yati#} (
<ls>DHĀTUP. 34,3</ls>) hat <ab>dies.</ab> Bedeutung: {#te tamarcayantastvaM#} (so ist zu lesen) {#hi no pitA yaH#} <ab>u. s. w.</ab>
<ls>PRAŚNOP. 6,8.</ls> {#priyAM vAcamaBivadantyo 'rcayantya eza vaH puRyaH sukfto brahmalokaH#}
<ls>MUṆḌ. UP. 1,2,8.</ls>
<ls>M. 2,181.</ls> <ls n="M. 2,">202.</ls> <ls n="M.">3,27.</ls> <ls n="M. 3,">144.</ls> <ls n="M. 3,">209.</ls> <ls n="M.">4,30.</ls> <ls n="M.">5,32.</ls> <ls n="M.">6,7.</ls> <ls>MBH. 1,6533.</ls> <ls n="MBH.">2,517.</ls> <ls n="MBH. 2,">1408.</ls> <ls n="MBH.">3,2762.</ls> <ls>N. 2,14.</ls> <ls n="N.">18,17.</ls> <ls>R. 2,32,13.</ls> <ls n="R.">4,25,6</ls> <ls n="R.">5,55,21.</ls> <ls>SUŚR. 1,15,6.</ls>

<ls n="M.">4,28.</ls> <ls n="M. 4,">29.</ls> — {%mit Ehrerbietung gereicht%}: {#yo 'rcitaM pratigfhRAti dadAtyarcitameva ca#}
<ls>M. 4,235.</ls> {#anarcita#}
<ls n="M. 4,">213.</ls> <ls>YĀJÑ. 1,167.</ls> — {#arcitavant#}
<ls>KATHĀS. 22,122.</ls> — <ab>desid.</ab> {#arcicizati#}

— Die Begriffe {%Licht%} und {%Sprache%} berühren sich auch sonst in der Sprache.
<div n="p">— {#anu#} {%zujauchzen%}; mit dem <ab>acc.</ab>: {#anu\ yadI^M ma\ruto^ mandasA\namArca\nnindra^m#}

<L>9324<pc>1-109-a<k1>arc<k2>arc<h>1 <hom>1.</hom> √{#arc#}¦, {#a/rcati#} und *{#fcati#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%strahlen, glänzen%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%singen, lobsingen, besingen%}. <div n="1">— 3〉 {%Jmd%} (<ab>Dat.</ab>) {%Etwas%} (<ab>Acc.</ab>) {%anpreisen%}. <div n="1">— 4〉 {%Jmd ehren, seine Achtung erweisen; Etwas achten%}. Ausnahmsweise auch <ab>Med.</ab> {#arcita#} {%geehrt, dem Verehrung erwiesen worden ist, in hohem Ansehen stehend; mit Achtung gereicht%}. <div n="1">— 5〉 {%schmücken%}. {#arcita#} {%geschmückt%} <ls>R. 1,2,29</ls>. <div n="m">— <ab>Caus.</ab> {#arcayati#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%strahlen machen%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%Jmd ehren, seine Achtung erweisen%}. Auch <ab>Med.</ab> <div n="p">— Mit {#anu#} {%Jmd%} (<ab>Acc.</ab>). {%zujauchzen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#aBi#} <ab>Act.</ab> <ab>Med.</ab> <div n="1">— 1〉 {%singen, besingen, preisen%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%ehren, verehren, seine Achtung erweisen%}. {#aByarcita#} wird mit {#aByarTita#} verwechselt. <div n="p">— Mit {#samaBi#} {%ehren, verehren, begrüssen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#pra#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%vorleuchten%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%anheben zu singen%}. <div n="1">— 3〉 {%besingen%}. <div n="1">— 4〉 {%Jmd%} (<ab>Dat.</ab>) {%Etwas%} (<ab>Acc.</ab>) {%anpreisen%}. <div n="1">— 5〉 {%ehren%}. <div n="m">— *<ab>Caus.</ab> {%ehren%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#aBipra#} {%besingen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#prati#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%entgegen strahlen%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%einen Gruss erwiedern%}. <div n="m">— <ab>Caus.</ab> {%einzeln begrüssen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#sam#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%feststellen%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%ehren, verehren%}. <div n="1">— 3〉 {%schmücken%}. <div n="m">— <ab>Caus.</ab> {%ehren%}. <LEND>
